docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY THIERRY, NICHOLE AS TO DEFENDANT ARTHORS, MARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF NICHOLE THIERRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCIA ARTHORS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM TO HAVE THIS MATTER HEARD TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2024 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIERRY, NICHOLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARTHORS, MARCIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
